Hey what's going on everyone welcome to fulfillment. So this is arguably in my opinion one of the most involved they can deliver on their promises. So our goal within this entire section is to help you fulfill your promises based on the best practices that we have found across all of our facilities. You will see within these modules that there are two types of fulfillment. We have in person fulfillment for you know for training and retaining clients at the facility and then we have hybrid fulfillment which is basically the remote style fulfillment and so they are significantly different and so I want to make sure that you know where you are. We have things that we share with you we have no ego with they're just the best practices that we've seen across lots and lots and lots of locations and so I hope that you use them well and I would encourage you to not experiment until you've actually replicated what we are doing and then once you do that then you know try and put your own spin on it because many times we just incur the burden or the the cost of error when we try to break a process that has been refined. So anywho this is the fulfillment section and dig in.
